violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Flat top grill was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinets throughout kitchen found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand washing sink for handwashing was not provided with soap. Soap should be available at all times.

Removal frequency of refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Refuse, recyclables, and returnables were not removed from the premises at a frequency to minimize odors and conditions that attract insects and rodents. Garbage receptacles in kitchen are over full. Garbage should be emptied more often.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Portable fan in the kitchen window was found with a dirty cover. Cupboard doors throughout the kitchen were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Toilet facilities. — --bathroom ventilation covers were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
